description: 100 hand-written fishing-themed dad jokes for Patient Angler. Every setup and punchline is unique.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a ladder?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to reach the high tide.

jokes.setup: Why did the trout blush?
jokes.punchline: It saw the river bank.

jokes.setup: Why did the bass join a band?
jokes.punchline: It already knew the scales.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish open a savings account?
jokes.punchline: It wanted to improve its net worth.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman carry a pencil?
jokes.punchline: He needed to draw a stronger line.

jokes.setup: Why was the fishing boat so confident?
jokes.punchline: It had plenty of buoyant self-esteem.

jokes.setup: Why did the hook get promoted?
jokes.punchline: It always caught on before everyone else.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish become a teacher?
jokes.punchline: It was excellent at schooling others.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman take a nap?
jokes.punchline: He needed a little reelaxation.

jokes.setup: Why did the crab avoid the contest?
jokes.punchline: It refused to sidestep the rules.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish bring an umbrella?
jokes.punchline: It expected scattered showers in the stream.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman sit on the dock?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to pier into the distance.

jokes.setup: Why did the sardine pack a suitcase?
jokes.punchline: It was ready to travel in a tight group.

jokes.setup: Why did the eel start a business?
jokes.punchline: It had a truly shocking proposal.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish fail its driving test?
jokes.punchline: It kept drifting into the wrong current.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman tell bad jokes?
jokes.punchline: He believed every story needed a hook.

jokes.setup: Why did the salmon cross the river?
jokes.punchline: It was heading for the other tide.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish avoid the internet?
jokes.punchline: It feared getting caught in the net.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman buy a new hat?
jokes.punchline: He needed better cap-ture equipment.

jokes.setup: Why did the tuna refuse the microphone?
jokes.punchline: It did not want to be canned live.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a ruler?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to measure up to the competition.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish become a detective?
jokes.punchline: It always followed the strongest line.

jokes.setup: Why did the boat visit the doctor?
jokes.punchline: It felt a little under the weather.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman smile at the worm?
jokes.punchline: It looked like reel good bait.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish stay after class?
jokes.punchline: It needed extra schooling time.

jokes.setup: Why did the octopus win the derby?
jokes.punchline: It had a hand in every catch.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman refuse to argue?
jokes.punchline: He would not take the bait.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish join the choir?
jokes.punchline: It had perfect tuna and timing.

jokes.setup: Why did the net go to therapy?
jokes.punchline: It felt trapped in the same pattern.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a calendar?
jokes.punchline: He hoped to catch the right date.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish become a comedian?
jokes.punchline: It always delivered a strong fin-ish.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman visit the bakery?
jokes.punchline: He heard the rolls were off the hook.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish take the elevator?
jokes.punchline: It wanted to rise above the stream.

jokes.setup: Why did the worm look nervous?
jokes.punchline: It had a sinking feeling about the hook.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman carry two rods?
jokes.punchline: He wanted a backup line of work.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish bring a flashlight?
jokes.punchline: It was exploring the deep end.

jokes.setup: Why was the dock invited to every party?
jokes.punchline: It always anchored the conversation.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman open a restaurant?
jokes.punchline: He already had the catch of the day.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish refuse to gamble?
jokes.punchline: It did not want to lose its scales.

jokes.setup: Why did the angler bring glue?
jokes.punchline: He wanted every fishing story to stick.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish call in sick?
jokes.punchline: It was feeling a little koi.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman start jogging?
jokes.punchline: He wanted better catch-up speed.

jokes.setup: Why did the shrimp avoid the spotlight?
jokes.punchline: It was tired of feeling small on stage.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a map?
jokes.punchline: He had completely lost his bearings.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish become a musician?
jokes.punchline: It loved playing with the current rhythm.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman get a promotion?
jokes.punchline: He always delivered results on the line.

jokes.setup: Why did the pike refuse dessert?
jokes.punchline: It was already stuffed to the gills.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman carry a bell?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to ring in a better catch.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish bring a notebook?
jokes.punchline: It had too many current events to remember.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman wear sunglasses?
jokes.punchline: The future looked bright off the water.

jokes.setup: Why did the carp start meditating?
jokes.punchline: It was searching for inner piece of river.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman avoid gossip?
jokes.punchline: He kept everything off the record and on the reel.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish bring a charger?
jokes.punchline: Its battery was running low tide.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman pack extra socks?
jokes.punchline: He expected a very wet ending.

jokes.setup: Why did the mackerel become an accountant?
jokes.punchline: It was good with schools of numbers.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman carry a spare line?
jokes.punchline: He believed in second catches.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish become a chef?
jokes.punchline: It knew how to season the sea.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a mirror?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to reflect on his last catch.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish refuse to hurry?
jokes.punchline: It preferred to go with the flow.

jokes.setup: Why did the bait open a café?
jokes.punchline: It wanted to attract a loyal following.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman take a camera?
jokes.punchline: He wanted proof that the big one existed.

jokes.setup: Why did the clam keep secrets?
jokes.punchline: It was naturally tight-lipped.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a broom?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to sweep the competition.

jokes.setup: Why did the lobster refuse to share?
jokes.punchline: It was feeling a bit shellfish.

jokes.setup: Why did the reel apply for a job?
jokes.punchline: It had plenty of experience handling pressure.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman open a bank account?
jokes.punchline: He wanted somewhere safe for his net earnings.

jokes.setup: Why did the cod become a lawyer?
jokes.punchline: It was great at arguing its case.

jokes.setup: Why did the fishing line stay calm?
jokes.punchline: It knew how to keep its tension.

jokes.setup: Why did the perch sit near the window?
jokes.punchline: It wanted the best seat in the school.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman buy a new clock?
jokes.punchline: He kept losing track of tide.

jokes.setup: Why did the buoy get invited to dinner?
jokes.punchline: It always lifted the mood.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman's story get longer?
jokes.punchline: The fish kept growing every time he told it.

jokes.setup: Why did the salmon carry a passport?
jokes.punchline: It was preparing for a long migration.

jokes.setup: Why did the tackle box feel organized?
jokes.punchline: It had everything neatly hooked up.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman whisper to the lake?
jokes.punchline: He did not want to wake the fish.

jokes.setup: Why did the anchovy avoid the elevator?
jokes.punchline: It preferred being packed on one level.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a newspaper?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to catch up on current events.

jokes.setup: Why did the lure wear perfume?
jokes.punchline: It wanted to be more attractive.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish refuse the promotion?
jokes.punchline: It did not want more responsibility on its plate.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman take acting lessons?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to improve his cast.

jokes.setup: Why did the crab become a referee?
jokes.punchline: It was good at calling things sideways.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a pillow?
jokes.punchline: He expected a long wait for a bite.

jokes.setup: Why did the minnow tell a big story?
jokes.punchline: It wanted to sound like a whale of a fish.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman's boots complain?
jokes.punchline: They were tired of being dragged through the mud.

jokes.setup: Why did the bait shop close early?
jokes.punchline: Business had gone off the hook.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish carry a briefcase?
jokes.punchline: It had an important school meeting.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a magnet?
jokes.punchline: He was hoping for an attractive catch.

jokes.setup: Why did the seaweed start a band?
jokes.punchline: It was great at kelp-ing the rhythm.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman buy a calculator?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to count every catch without losing track.

jokes.setup: Why did the oyster stay home?
jokes.punchline: It was feeling a little closed off.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a chair?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to take a seat by the reel estate.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish avoid the dentist?
jokes.punchline: It was afraid of getting its scales scraped.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman carry a lantern?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to brighten up the night bite.

jokes.setup: Why did the squid get the job?
jokes.punchline: It had plenty of ink-lination.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman pack lunch?
jokes.punchline: He did not trust the catch of the day.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish take music lessons?
jokes.punchline: It wanted to improve its bass line.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman bring a dictionary?
jokes.punchline: He wanted to define the perfect catch.

jokes.setup: Why did the boat refuse to gossip?
jokes.punchline: It did not want to rock the boat.

jokes.setup: Why did the fish become an architect?
jokes.punchline: It had great schools of design.

jokes.setup: Why did the fisherman carry a spare hook?
jokes.punchline: He liked having a second point of view.
